news.title:
Mid-cap IT firms like Coforge, Persistent, and Mphasis show stronger Q4FY26 growth.
Deal momentum, vertical demand, and vendor consolidation drive mid-tier IT outperformance.
news.summary:
Mid-cap IT firms like Coforge, Persistent, and Mphasis show stronger Q4FY26 growth.
Deal momentum, vertical demand, and vendor consolidation drive mid-tier IT outperformance.

news.title:
Mphasis Ltd announces an earnings conference call on April 30, 2026, post Q4 and FY26 results.
The call will include a webcast, virtual access, and replay options; details on Mphasis' website.
news.summary:
Mphasis Ltd announces an earnings conference call on April 30, 2026, post Q4 and FY26 results.
The call will include a webcast, virtual access, and replay options; details on Mphasis' website.

news.title:
Mphasis Ltd. surged 5.16%, outperforming its sector by 1.47 percentage points.
The stock's rise sparks debate over a recovery or technical bounce in a mixed market.
news.summary:
Mphasis Ltd. surged 5.16%, outperforming its sector by 1.47 percentage points.
The stock's rise sparks debate over a recovery or technical bounce in a mixed market.

news.title:
Mphasis received a tax demand for FY20-21 totaling ₹151.7 crore related to TDS on overseas payments.
The company plans to appeal, stating no material financial impact is expected.
news.summary:
Mphasis received a tax demand for FY20-21 totaling ₹151.7 crore related to TDS on overseas payments.
The company plans to appeal, stating no material financial impact is expected.

news.title:
Mphasis completes first phase of modernizing Flagstar Bank's tech, consolidating 6 data centers into 2.
The delivery included zero downtime and improved operational resilience for Flagstar Bank.
news.summary:
Mphasis completes first phase of modernizing Flagstar Bank's tech, consolidating 6 data centers into 2.
The delivery included zero downtime and improved operational resilience for Flagstar Bank.

news.title:
Mphasis fined Rs.1.24L for non-compliance with SEBI board rules in Dec 2025.
No board meeting held between Dec 11, 2025, and Jan 6, 2026; waiver outcome pending.
news.summary:
Mphasis fined Rs.1.24L for non-compliance with SEBI board rules in Dec 2025.
No board meeting held between Dec 11, 2025, and Jan 6, 2026; waiver outcome pending.

news.title:
Mphasis Ltd's Board will meet on April 29, 2026, to review Q4 FY26 results and consider FY26 dividend.
MOFSL gives Mphasis a BUY rating with TP of Rs 3,400; HDFC Securities maintains ADD with TP of Rs 2,660.
news.summary:
Mphasis Ltd's Board will meet on April 29, 2026, to review Q4 FY26 results and consider FY26 dividend.
MOFSL gives Mphasis a BUY rating with TP of Rs 3,400; HDFC Securities maintains ADD with TP of Rs 2,660.

news.title:
Mphasis receives assessment order for AY 2023-24 with Rs. 2286.9 cr demand.
Issues include ESOP expenses, subcontractor payments, and GST differences; firm plans appeal.
news.summary:
Mphasis receives assessment order for AY 2023-24 with Rs. 2286.9 cr demand.
Issues include ESOP expenses, subcontractor payments, and GST differences; firm plans appeal.

news.title:
CLSA rates Mphasis as 'hold' with Rs 2,120 target; notes client churn and slow deal conversion.
Revenue rose 2.6% to Rs 4,003 cr, profit fell 5.7% to Rs 442 cr; margins stable at ~15%.
news.summary:
CLSA rates Mphasis as 'hold' with Rs 2,120 target; notes client churn and slow deal conversion.
Revenue rose 2.6% to Rs 4,003 cr, profit fell 5.7% to Rs 442 cr; margins stable at ~15%.

news.title:
Post-Accenture Q2, analysts see AI as growth enabler but not a demand revival driver for Indian IT.
Infosys, Mphasis, Coforge, and Wipro gain; selective stock picks advised amid geopolitical and macro concerns.
news.summary:
Post-Accenture Q2, analysts see AI as growth enabler but not a demand revival driver for Indian IT.
Infosys, Mphasis, Coforge, and Wipro gain; selective stock picks advised amid geopolitical and macro concerns.

news.title:
Mphasis Ltd surged 5.3% to Rs 2,183.1 on 18 Mar 2026, hitting an intraday high.
The stock rebounded after a 5-day decline, outperforming the IT sector and Sensex.
news.summary:
Mphasis Ltd surged 5.3% to Rs 2,183.1 on 18 Mar 2026, hitting an intraday high.
The stock rebounded after a 5-day decline, outperforming the IT sector and Sensex.

news.title:
Infosys, Persistent, Mphasis shares rise as rupee hits record low of 92.28/USD, boosting margins.
Nifty IT index up 20% YTD; IT stocks rebound from 52-week lows, Persistent gains 12%, Mphasis up 10%.
news.summary:
Infosys, Persistent, Mphasis shares rise as rupee hits record low of 92.28/USD, boosting margins.
Nifty IT index up 20% YTD; IT stocks rebound from 52-week lows, Persistent gains 12%, Mphasis up 10%.

news.title:
Emkay Global revises portfolio, adding Infosys, HCL Tech, Indus Towers, SRF; exits Mphasis, Sun Pharma, Gravita.
It turns marginally overweight on IT sector, citing attractive valuations post AI sell-off; sees 6.5-18.3% return potential.
news.summary:
Emkay Global revises portfolio, adding Infosys, HCL Tech, Indus Towers, SRF; exits Mphasis, Sun Pharma, Gravita.
It turns marginally overweight on IT sector, citing attractive valuations post AI sell-off; sees 6.5-18.3% return potential.

news.title:
Jefferies downgrades MphasiS to Hold, reducing target price to Rs 2450.
Target price cut significantly from Rs 3410 to Rs 2450 by Jefferies.
news.summary:
Jefferies downgrades MphasiS to Hold, reducing target price to Rs 2450.
Target price cut significantly from Rs 3410 to Rs 2450 by Jefferies.

news.title:
Jefferies downgraded Infosys, HCLTech, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, TCS, and Hexaware on AI concerns, cutting price targets up to 33%.
Despite YTD declines up to 16%, Jefferies sees more downside. Coforge, Sagility, and IKS Health are its top picks.
news.summary:
Jefferies downgraded Infosys, HCLTech, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, TCS, and Hexaware on AI concerns, cutting price targets up to 33%.
Despite YTD declines up to 16%, Jefferies sees more downside. Coforge, Sagility, and IKS Health are its top picks.

news.title:
FIIs reduced stakes in Indian IT firms like Infosys and TCS amid AI concerns.
Investor sentiment shift reflects pressure on the IT sector over the past year.
news.summary:
FIIs reduced stakes in Indian IT firms like Infosys and TCS amid AI concerns.
Investor sentiment shift reflects pressure on the IT sector over the past year.

news.title:
Indian equity markets fell sharply, ending a three-session gain streak due to US-Iran tensions.
Tata Investment, Newgen, and other key stocks showed significant movement amid broad-based sell-off.
news.summary:
Indian equity markets fell sharply, ending a three-session gain streak due to US-Iran tensions.
Tata Investment, Newgen, and other key stocks showed significant movement amid broad-based sell-off.

news.title:
Mphasis' AI platform NeoIP drives significant deal wins and pipeline growth.
Revenue rose 1.5% QoQ and 7.4% YoY; Q3 saw $428M net new contracts, 4 large deals.
news.summary:
Mphasis' AI platform NeoIP drives significant deal wins and pipeline growth.
Revenue rose 1.5% QoQ and 7.4% YoY; Q3 saw $428M net new contracts, 4 large deals.

news.title:
Zensar faces revenue decline as Cisco, one of its top clients, reduces IT vendor partnerships and discretionary spending.
Peers like Hexaware, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, and Sonata also face client pressures, highlighting risks for mid-tier IT firms.
news.summary:
Zensar faces revenue decline as Cisco, one of its top clients, reduces IT vendor partnerships and discretionary spending.
Peers like Hexaware, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, and Sonata also face client pressures, highlighting risks for mid-tier IT firms.

news.title:
Mphasis anticipates a strong Q4FY26, driven by a robust deal pipeline with $2B TCV wins in the last 12 months.
Despite a 5.7% QoQ profit drop in Q3FY26, BFSI and insurance sectors show strong growth, supporting future momentum.
news.summary:
Mphasis anticipates a strong Q4FY26, driven by a robust deal pipeline with $2B TCV wins in the last 12 months.
Despite a 5.7% QoQ profit drop in Q3FY26, BFSI and insurance sectors show strong growth, supporting future momentum.
